text:
/ci3 1 くっ、また集落に襲撃ですか！
あの子達の住居……
わたしが守ってあげないと！

/ci3 1 こっち側と同時に
北側の集落もか。
……何にせよ、まずは目の前のからだ。

/ci3 1 Argh, another attack on a settlement! I need
to protect their homes!

/ci3 1 The northern settlement is under attack,
too? ...Even so, we have to deal with what's in
front of us first.
